params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters or attacks, exile a card from a graveyard. Put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME.
Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, exile a card from a graveyard.

params.AddKeyword: Flying & First Strike & Double Strike & Deathtouch & Haste & Hexproof & Indestructible & Lifelink & Menace & Reach & Trample & Vigilance
params.Description: CARDNAME has flying as long as a card exiled with it has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance.
